purpose: Report friction, pressure, HTC, and effective-heat-resistance closures derived from mainline continuation CFD (Salt 2/3/4 Jin) after OF13 thermal blocker (B1) resolved.
scope: Salt 2/3/4 Jin mainline continuation (t=7915 s). Salt 1 excluded (short window). Coarse mesh; no GCI bound.
limitations: Coarse mesh only (no GCI bound, T6 blocked).
2-7 wall faces per case had NaN T (sanitized to field mean).
Salt 1 excluded (heat closes only -2.08%; short window).
Nu(Re,Pr) not identifiable (Pr collinear with Re in this laminar salt set).
Probe-CSV geometry subsequently found to be schematic (swapped lower/right); superseded by mesh-PCA centerlines from AGENT-162.
